product: Single-use refresh tokens for OAuth applications
tagline: You can now configure single use refresh tokens for OAuth applications integrated with Databricks.
what_it_does: You can now configure single use refresh tokens for OAuth applications integrated with Databricks. This security feature requires token rotation after each use, enhancing protection for user to machine authentication flows. This page explains single use refresh tokens for OAuth applications integrated with Databricks and describes how to configure them using the Databricks API.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now configure single use refresh tokens for OAuth applications integrated with Databricks. This security feature requires token rotation after each use, enhancing protection for user to machine authentication flows.
key_takeaway: You can now configure single use refresh tokens for OAuth applications integrated with Databricks.
